$comment: Config template for component-ui-to-design. Copy to configs/<app>.json and fill by INSPECTING the target Shopify app's frontend repo (do NOT guess). Paths: `frontend`/`esbuildDir` are relative to THIS file's directory unless absolute; `alias` values are relative to `frontend`; `shims` values are relative to this file. See SKILL.md §Per-app config. Prerequisite: run /sync-design-system for the app's DS first — this skill renders against its bundle.
name: <app>
frontend: <path to the app's SPA frontend root, e.g. ../../../../<repo>/web/frontend>
esbuildDir: <dir with esbuild + ts-morph installed, usually the DS sync dir, e.g. ../../../../<repo>/.ds-sync>
